english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
[Al-Fatihah – The Opener 1 : 0]

All praise belongs to Allah, Lord of all the worlds,
[Al-Fatihah – The Opener 1 : 1]

the All-beneficent, the All-merciful,
[Al-Fatihah – The Opener 1 : 2]

Master of the Day of Retribution.
[Al-Fatihah – The Opener 1 : 3]

You [alone] do we worship, and to You [alone] do we turn for help.
[Al-Fatihah – The Opener 1 : 4]

Guide us on the straight path,
[Al-Fatihah – The Opener 1 : 5]

arabic text: صِرَاطَ الَّذِينَ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ غَيْرِ الْمَغْضُوبِ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا الضَّالِّينَ
english translation text:
the path of those whom You have blessed — such as have not incurred Your wrath, nor are astray.
[Al-Fatihah – The Opener 1 : 6]
